Capital Hub Team

Experienced Professionals

The Capital Hub team brings together experts with extensive experience in finance, banking, consulting and management, dedicated to your business success.

Our Team

Experienced Professionals

Experts dedicated to your business success.

Leadership

Leadership Team

Chief Executive Officer

Ciprian V.

CEO – Capital Hub

Ciprian has over two decades of experience in leading and transforming organizations, both in the private sector and in strategic projects with national impact. An economist by training, with solid expertise in management and financial analysis, he approaches financing and partnerships with rigor, structure and constant results orientation.

His credentials:

  • CEO experience in multiple companies, including publicly listed organizations
  • Entrepreneurial track record and ability to create and launch new projects
  • Involvement in advising public initiatives with strategic relevance
  • Economic training and applied perspective on the real needs of SMEs

Chief Operations Officer

Iulia V.

COO – Capital Hub

Iulia has over 14 years of experience within the Romanian Parliament, where she managed administrative, operational and coordination activities in highly complex structures. At Capital Hub, she ensures the operational functioning of the platform and coordinates the entire administrative flow of collaborations and contracts.

Her credentials:

  • Extensive experience in public administration and legislative processes
  • Managing operational projects and complex activities
  • Collaboration with NGOs and public institutions
  • Attention to detail and discipline in managing documents and processes

Development Coordinator

Dan C.

Development Coordinator – Capital Hub

Dan has over two decades of entrepreneurial experience, during which he developed and coordinated projects in different fields, with operational, commercial and strategic components. At Capital Hub, he actively contributes to portfolio expansion and client relationship development.

His credentials:

  • Over two decades of entrepreneurship and varied projects
  • Ability to build and maintain trust-based relationships
  • Results-oriented approach and opportunity identification
  • Adaptability and understanding of business mechanisms

Chief Financial Officer

Sorin B.

CFO – Capital Hub

Sorin has over two decades of experience in financial services, management and strategic development, built in roles such as Managing Partner and Associate Partner in companies in leasing, consulting and financial operations. He manages portfolio integration, file evaluation and coordination of financial processes at Capital Hub.

His credentials:

  • Over 20 years of experience in financial services and management
  • Expertise in relationships with banks, financiers and investors
  • Strong skills in structuring, analyzing and transferring financial portfolios
  • Economic training and strategic perspective on financial products
Expert Team

Dedicated Specialists

Adina R.

Accounting Expert

Adina has over three decades of experience in the economic and financial field, in which she coordinated the economic-financial processes of a group of companies and managed complex structures from SME and corporate areas.

Her credentials:

  • Over 30 years of experience in accounting and financial analysis
  • Coordination of economic-financial processes at group level
  • Expertise in financing for investments, current activity and European projects

Bogdan S.

Senior Credit Consultant

Bogdan has over 15 years of experience in banking and financing, consolidated through coordination and management roles in banking institutions and organizations with complex sales structures. He specializes in structuring credit solutions for SMEs.

His credentials:

  • Over 15 years of experience in banking and financing
  • Expertise in structuring loans for SMEs
  • Ability to negotiate and optimize credit terms

Robert T.

Senior Credit Consultant

Robert has over 15 years of experience in banking, lending and financial consulting, accumulated in top banking institutions and companies specializing in financial services for SMEs. At Capital Hub he decisively contributes to configuring lending solutions for companies.

His credentials:

  • Over 15 years of experience in banking and financial consulting
  • Expertise in structuring and negotiating loans for SMEs
  • Professionalism, rigor and constant results orientation
Contact the Team

Ready to work with professionals?

Contact us today for a free consultation and discover how the Capital Hub team can help you access the right financing.
